positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast, illustrative design featuring a glowing crescent moon nestled among intricate, stylized tropical foliage and delicate floral elements. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau combined with minimalist sacred geometry. Use clean, thick linework and a limited, complementary palette of deep indigo, muted gold, cream, and teal. The composition must be perfectly centered and balanced for a central apparel print, emphasizing crisp silhouettes, negative space, and elegant flow. Ethereal glow, woodcut quality, highly detailed illustration, vector graphic art, clean edges, maximal symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signatures, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, graffiti, photo, realistic, monochrome only
